---
title: "Data Cleaning"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Load in libraries
```{r warning=FALSE, message = FALSE}
library(rmarkdown)
library(haven)
library(tidyverse)
library(plyr)
```

# Load in 2011-2012 datasets
```{r}
demo_1112 <- read_xpt("data/2011_2012/DEMO_G.xpt")
rh_1112 <- read_xpt("data/2011_2012/RHQ_G.xpt")
pht_1112 <- read_xpt("data/2011_2012/PHTHTE_G.xpt")
```

# Load in 2013-2014 datasets
```{r}
demo_1314 <- read_xpt("data/2013_2014/DEMO_H.xpt")
rh_1314 <- read_xpt("data/2013_2014/RHQ_H.xpt")
pht_1314 <- read_xpt("data/2013_2014/PHTHTE_H.xpt")
```

# Load in 2015-2016 datasets
```{r}
demo_1516 <- read_xpt("data/2015_2016/DEMO_I.xpt")
rh_1516 <- read_xpt("data/2015_2016/RHQ_I.xpt")
pht_1516 <- read_xpt("data/2015_2016/PHTHTE_I.xpt")
```

# Load in 2017-2018 datasets
```{r}
demo_1718<- read_xpt("data/2017_2018/DEMO_J.xpt")
rh_1718 <- read_xpt("data/2017_2018/RHQ_J.xpt")
pht_1718 <- read_xpt("data/2017_2018/PHTHTE_J.xpt")
```

# Clean 2017-2018 data
```{r}
# Select variables we will be using for our analysis
# demographics
demo_1718 <- demo_1718 |>
  select(SEQN, RIDAGEYR, RIDRETH1)
# reproductive health
rh_1718 <- rh_1718 |>
  select(SEQN, RHQ010, RHQ031, RHQ060, RHQ076)
# phthalates
pht_1718 <- pht_1718 |>
  select(SEQN, URXCNP, URXCOP, URXECP, URXMBP, URXMC1, URXMEP, URXMHH, URXMHP, 
         URXMIB, URXMOH, URXMZP)

# Merge the data and remove NAs
data_1718 <- demo_1718 %>%
  full_join(rh_1718, by="SEQN") %>%
  full_join(pht_1718, by="SEQN") 
data_1718 <- na.omit(data_1718)
colnames(data_1718) <- c("SEQN", "Age", "Race", "Age_FirstPeriod", "RegularPeriod_12m", 
                         "Age_LastPeriod", "UnablePregnant", "MCNP", "MCOP", "MECPP", 
                         "MBP", "MCPP", "MEP", "MEHHP", "MEHP", "MIBP", "MEOHP", "MBZP")

# Drop missing values
data_1718 <- data_1718 %>% 
  filter(Age_FirstPeriod != 777) %>%
  filter(Age_FirstPeriod != 999) %>%
  filter(RegularPeriod_12m != 7) %>%
  filter(RegularPeriod_12m != 9) %>%
  filter(Age_LastPeriod != 777) %>%
  filter(Age_LastPeriod != 999) %>%
  filter(UnablePregnant != 7) %>%
  filter(UnablePregnant != 9)

# Recode variables (Race, RegularPeriod_12m, UnablePregnant)
data_1718$Race <- factor(data_1718$Race)
data_1718$Race <- revalue(data_1718$Race, c("1" = "Mexican_American",
                                            "2" = "Other_Hispanic",
                                            "3" = "NonHispanic_White",
                                            "4" = "NonHispanic_Black",
                                            "5" = "OtherRace_MultiRacial")
                          )
data_1718$RegularPeriod_12m <- factor(data_1718$RegularPeriod_12m)
data_1718$RegularPeriod_12m <- revalue(data_1718$RegularPeriod_12m, c("1" = "Yes",
                                                                      "2" = "No")
                                       )
data_1718$UnablePregnant <- factor(data_1718$UnablePregnant)
data_1718$UnablePregnant <- revalue(data_1718$UnablePregnant, c("1" = "Yes",
                                                                "2" = "No")
                                    )

# Summary of variables
summary(data_1718)

# Save as csv
write_csv(data_1718, "data/datacleaned_1718.csv")

```
